calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of: (1) Motion To Compel Arbitration And (2) Motion To Stay Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1281.4 Pending Resolution Of Defendants Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANT WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD's (1) Motion To Compel Arbitration And (2) Motion To Stay Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1281.4 Pending Resolution Of Defendants Motion To Compel Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Off calendar. Dismissal of entire action of all parties and all causes of action without prejudice filed May 13, 2024.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Park. (301/RCE)
